candidate_llm_application: 4-stage forest-succession training with explicit gap-dynamics weight removal and self-shade-tolerance climax selection

results.title: Ecological succession — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Source-domain ecology reference only. Discusses pioneer-climax succession but contains no LLM training, no weight pruning, no 4-stage neural-net schedule. Source-side terms appear but candidate's LLM-side training-mechanism words are absent; kw counts cross-domain content-word overlap with the LLM application, none here.

results.title: Forest Succession Paradigm with Shade Tolerance Index — PMC
results.rationale: Pure forest-ecology paper, source domain only. No LLM training/pruning/scheduling. No functional equivalence to LLM training pipeline.

results.title: Forest Succession — ScienceDirect Topics
results.rationale: Generic ecological-succession overview. Source-domain reference only; no LLM application or training mechanism.

results.title: Prune&Comp: Layer-Pruned LLMs with Magnitude Compensation (2025/7)
results.rationale: Prune&Comp does iterative magnitude-based prune-then-compensate at the layer level. This partially resembles the gap-dynamics removal-and-regrow leg of stage 3 but lacks (a) the four explicit succession stages, (b) the shade-tolerance / low-magnitude RECRUITMENT (it removes high-magnitude but does NOT slow-LR retrain low-magnitude into the gap as recruited capabilities), and (c) climax self-shade-tolerance selection. Below the 0.7 functional threshold under a strict reading of the full mechanism. Only one cross-domain LLM-side content-word arguably overlaps (re-training with magnitude-gap concept). No source-side ecology words present. kw<2, sem<0.7, func<0.7.

results.title: Two-Stage Regularization Structured Pruning (2025/5)
results.rationale: Two stages, not four; uses L1 regularization then prune. Does not implement gap-dynamics retraining inside a removed weight region, no shade-tolerance recruitment, no climax self-consistency selection. Two-stage != 4-stage succession schedule. Functional below 0.7. No keyword overlap with candidate's specific content words.

results.title: Efficient Post-Training Pruning with Statistical Correction (2026/2)
results.rationale: Single post-training statistical pruning + energy compensation; not a multi-stage succession schedule, no gap-recruitment of shade-tolerant weights, no climax selection. Far below threshold.

results.title: Self-Evolving Curriculum for LLM Reasoning (2025/5)
results.rationale: Self-evolving curriculum schedules training difficulty over data, not weight-magnitude succession stages, no pruning/gap dynamics, no climax self-shade-tolerance. Candidate explicitly distinguishes itself from this paper. Sub-threshold on all axes.

results.title: Knowledge Circuits Continual Pre-Training (2025/2)
results.rationale: Descriptive analysis of knowledge-circuit phase-shifts during continual PT; not a prescriptive 4-stage succession training discipline with weight-gap removal and climax selection. Sub-threshold.

disagreement_with_prior_judge.notes: Prior judge scored rank 4 (Prune&Comp) at 0.74 and rank 5 (Two-Stage Regularization) at 0.72. Fresh re-judgement finds Prune&Comp covers only the prune+compensate leg, missing the 4-stage succession discipline, shade-tolerant low-magnitude recruitment, and climax self-shade-tolerance selection — full-mechanism functional equivalence is below 0.7. Two-Stage Regularization uses two stages (not four), no gap-dynamics weight removal with slow-LR recruitment, no climax self-consistency selection — well below 0.7. Strict reading of FROZEN OR rule against the candidate's distinguishing mechanisms (gap-dynamics + climax self-shade-tolerance) yields zero hits.
